title: crataegus monogyna f. denudata
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. denudata, also known as the flowering hawthorn or May blossom, is a deciduous shrub that is a variety of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus monogyna), characterized by its bare, thornless stems. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties that include acting as a vasodilator and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna f. denudata include reducing blood pressure, improving heart health, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and promote relaxation.
